summary: Iteration 41: Complete testing of iToke Fiscal Report features. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified via Playwright - fiscal report page and admin report layout tab working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: data-testid attributes are present in fiscal-report.tsx but React Native Web may not render them as HTML attributes - consider using testID prop instead for better Playwright compatibility
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing 15 transactions in sales_history
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fiscal report feature fully implemented and tested. Backend APIs: PUT /api/auth/cpf (CPF validation), GET /api/establishments/me/fiscal-report (returns transactions, summary, establishment info), GET /api/establishments/me/fiscal-report/pdf (generates PDF), GET/PUT /api/admin/report-layout (admin layout settings). Frontend pages: /establishment/fiscal-report (shows transactions with customer CPF, email, values, download PDF button), /admin/dashboard 'Relatorio' tab (edit company_name, tagline, disclaimer, footer_text).

backend_apis: PUT /api/auth/cpf - Updates CPF with 11 digit validation (200 OK)
PUT /api/auth/cpf - Rejects invalid CPF with <11 or >11 digits (400 Bad Request)
PUT /api/auth/cpf - Cleans formatted CPF (removes dots, dashes)
GET /api/establishments/me/fiscal-report - Returns transactions, summary, establishment info, layout
GET /api/establishments/me/fiscal-report/pdf - Generates valid PDF (verified PDF magic bytes)
GET /api/admin/report-layout - Returns layout settings (admin only, 403 for non-admin)
PUT /api/admin/report-layout - Updates layout fields (admin only, 403 for non-admin)
frontend_establishment: Establishment dashboard shows 'Relatorio Fiscal' action card
Fiscal report page loads with header 'Relatorio Fiscal - Comprovante de pagamentos dos clientes'
Info banner explains report proves clients paid, not iToke
Establishment info card shows business_name, CNPJ, address, period
Summary cards show: 15 Transacoes, R$ 21,50 Creditos, R$ 460,45 Dinheiro
'Baixar PDF Completo' button present and functional
Transaction details show: Cliente, CPF (formatted), Email, Oferta, Creditos, Dinheiro, Total
frontend_admin: 'Layout do Relatorio Fiscal' section with editable fields
Slogan input (default: Descontos que valem ouro)
Rodape input (default: Documento gerado automaticamente pela plataforma iToke)
